summary: Testing completed for NASSAQ Conflict Resolution Auto-Suggestion Feature. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements present and working. APIs return proper response structures.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/schedules/{schedule_id}/conflicts/suggestions - Returns proper structure with schedule_id, total_suggestions, suggestions array, and can_auto_resolve boolean
POST /api/schedules/{schedule_id}/conflicts/apply-suggestion - Validates session_id, target_day, target_slot_id params. Returns proper error messages in Arabic
POST /api/schedules/{schedule_id}/conflicts/auto-resolve - Returns success, message_ar, message_en, resolved_count, failed_count
Frontend SchedulePage.jsx has handleApplySuggestion and handleAutoResolveAll functions properly implemented
Frontend fetches suggestions alongside conflicts in fetchSessions callback
Auto-resolve button shows count of suggestions and has proper data-testid
Apply suggestion buttons are rendered for each conflict with matching suggestion
seed_data_creation: None - used existing accounts and schedules
context_for_next_testing_agent: Conflict Resolution APIs verified working. Current schedule (school-nor-001) has 360 sessions with NO conflicts, so suggestions array is empty. To test with actual conflicts, create overlapping sessions manually. All 3 new APIs return proper response structures and validation errors.

verified: Returns suggestions array (empty when no conflicts)
Requires session_id, target_day, target_slot_id query params
Returns 404 for invalid session_id with Arabic message
Validates teacher and class availability before moving
Returns 'لا توجد تعارضات لحلها' when no conflicts

4_frontend_schedule_page.description: SchedulePage.jsx UI elements for conflict resolution
verified: data-testid='auto-resolve-btn' - Auto-resolve all button (when suggestions exist)
Suggestions fetched alongside conflicts in fetchSessions
Sheet opens when conflicts button clicked
Each conflict shows matching suggestion with Apply button
Loading states for apply and auto-resolve actions
